name: Full Consensus with Loosened Trade-Flow Confirmation
hypothesis: The parent spec, which combined OBI, deep-book imbalance, and ask concentration, was too restrictive when adding a trade-flow confirmation, resulting in only 17 trades. By loosening the trade-flow condition (z-score > 0.5), we can generate a statistically significant number of trades to properly evaluate if this confirmation layer adds value to the powerful base formula.
mutation_note: Loosened threshold for trade_imbalance_signed from >1.0 to >0.5 as recommended by feedback to increase the trade count from a statistically insignificant level.
